forecast-period.text: Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly and light increasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sunny. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 24.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then tending northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 25.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Sunny. The chance of fog south of Yunta early this morning. The chance of morning frost about the Gammon Ranges. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 23.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 28.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 28.
